maison.title: The Maison
maison.subtitle: A quiet sanctuary for skin in the heart of Boca Raton.
maison.about: The Arc Beauty Services was founded on a simple belief — that everyone deserves to feel confident and radiant. Every ritual is performed by hand, never rushed, and tailored entirely to you. Step inside and let us restore your glow.
maison.visitBody: We love our clients — book ahead and let us prepare your private ritual.
